summary: The user is feeling overwhelmed with their new job, which they started in March, and is seeking tips for managing work-related stress. They express a desire to set realistic goals and create a daily routine to focus on one task at a time, while also incorporating meditation and journaling as stress-reducing activities.
facts: The user started a new job in March 2023, which has been a source of anxiety for them. The user is looking for tips on managing work-related stress. The user is interested in setting realistic goals and expectations to reduce anxiety. The user plans to create a daily routine to focus on one task at a time. The user intends to incorporate meditation and journaling into their evening routine to help manage stress. The user is concerned about their ability to quiet their mind during meditation but is committed to being patient with themselves. The user is excited to start their meditation and journaling practice to feel more relaxed and in control of their thoughts and emotions.
